Package javadraw

Interface DrawableObject

All Known Implementing Classes:
CheckBox, Component, CustomPolygon, Image, Line, MultiRenderable, Oval, Polygon, RadioButton, RadioButtonGroup, Rectangle, Renderable, RoundedRectangle, Text, ToggleButton, Triangle
public interface DrawableObject
An Object which is Drawable on the Screen (Renderables and non-Renderables).

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    back()
    Bring the Object to the back of the Screen
    void
    front()
    Bring the Object to the front of the Screen
    Location
    location()
    Get the Location of the Object
    void
    move(double dx, double dy)
    Move the Object by a specified distance, (dx, dy).
    void
    move(Location location)
    Move the Object by a specified distance, (dx, dy), pulled from a Location's x and y fields.
    void
    moveTo(double x, double y)
    Move the Object to a new Location on the Screen
    void
    moveTo(Location location)
    Move the Object to a new Location on the Screen
    void
    remove()
    Remove the Object from the Screen (but not from memory).
    double
    x()
    Get the x-coordinate of the Object.
    double
    x(double x)
    Set the x-coordinate of the Object
    double
    y()
    Get the y-coordinate of the Object
    double
    y(double y)
    Set the y-coordinate of the Object

  • Method Details

    • x

      double x()
      Get the x-coordinate of the Object.
      Returns:
      a double x-coordinate

    • y

      double y()
      Get the y-coordinate of the Object
      Returns:
      a double y-coordinate

    • x

      double x(double x)
      Set the x-coordinate of the Object
      Parameters:
      x - the new x-coordinate to set to
      Returns:
      the new x-coordinate

    • y

      double y(double y)
      Set the y-coordinate of the Object
      Parameters:
      y - the y-coordinate to set to
      Returns:
      the new y-coordinate

    • location

      Location location()
      Get the Location of the Object
      Returns:
      a Location

    • move

      void move(double dx, double dy)
      Move the Object by a specified distance, (dx, dy).
      Parameters:
      dx - the distance on the x-axis to move by
      dy - the distance on the y-axis to move by

    • move

      void move(Location location)
      Move the Object by a specified distance, (dx, dy), pulled from a Location's x and y fields.
      Parameters:
      location - the Location to pull the dx and dy from.

    • moveTo

      void moveTo(double x, double y)
      Move the Object to a new Location on the Screen
      Parameters:
      x - the x-coordinate to move to
      y - the y-coordinate to move to

    • moveTo

      void moveTo(Location location)
      Move the Object to a new Location on the Screen
      Parameters:
      location - the Location to move to

    • front

      void front()
      Bring the Object to the front of the Screen

    • back

      void back()
      Bring the Object to the back of the Screen

    • remove

      void remove()
      Remove the Object from the Screen (but not from memory).
